name: socialforge
description: Open-source social media engine — asset-first compositing, AI image+video, 7-platform copy adaptation. Runs on Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Antigravity.

interface.shortDescription: Open-source social media engine — asset-first compositing, AI image+video, 7-platform copy adaptation. Runs on Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Antigravity.
interface.longDescription: 16 skills + 25 commands + 5 agents + 22 scripts + 10 HTTP MCP connectors. Asset-first compositing (brand assets are sacred, AI is the creative layer around them). AI image (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), AI video (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro), 7-platform copy adaptation (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Threads, X, Facebook, YouTube Shorts), human-in-the-loop review galleries, C2PA content provenance signing for EU AI Act Article 50. Portable across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity via the Agent Skills open standard.
defaultPrompt: Set up a new brand for social media production.
Index a brand's photo library so AI can match assets to upcoming posts.
Start a new monthly production cycle for the brand and generate all creative.
Build a review gallery so the client can approve creative before delivery.
